response.justification: The candidate lacks the required 5-10 years of C++ development experience on Windows platforms and has limited exposure to financial-services domains, SQL Server/Oracle, or capital markets systems. While they demonstrate strong software development skills across multiple languages and platforms, their primary expertise lies in Node.js, TypeScript, Dlang, and JavaScript rather than C++. Domain substitution (e.g., investment banking) is not evident.
strengths: Extensive full-stack development experience across multiple languages and platforms (JavaScript, TypeScript, Node.js, Dlang, Java)
Strong problem-solving and software craftsmanship skills (TDD, CI/CD, pair programming)
Experience with low-latency systems and performance optimization in micro-services architectures
concerns: Insufficient C++ experience on Windows platform (only ~6 months at National Instruments)
No demonstrated experience with SQL Server, Oracle, or capital markets systems
Lacks domain expertise in fixed income, derivatives, or investment banking
